zh.Enmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特恩莫
zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry是Guillaume Malet和Hesilia Crispin的兒子，於1055年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特恩莫。他和Mrs. Gilbert Malet至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Enmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdo: 英国英格兰薩默塞特恩莫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry是Guillaume Malet和Hesilia Crispin的儿子，于1055年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特恩莫。他和Mrs. Gilbert Malet至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).
French: variant of   Mallet   3.

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.
French (mainly Nord): nickname from mal ‘bad’ (from Latin malus).
Indian (northern states): variant of   Mall  .

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Curry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Comhraidhe, ‘descendant of Comhraidhe’, a personal name of uncertain meaning.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Corra (see Corr ).
Scottish and northern English: variant of   Currie  .

variants.name: Corr
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Aidan, Brendan.
Irish:
Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Corra ‘descendant of Corra’, a personal name from corr ‘spear, pointed object’. It is occasionally translated into English as Weir (from Irish cora ‘weir’).

variants.name: Currey
meanings: Irish: variant of   Curry  .
English: habiational name from Curry in Somerset, so named after a stream possibly meaning ‘border river’ (compare Welsh cwr ‘corner, border’ or Cornish cor ‘hedge, boundary’).
English (of Norman origin): from Old French curie ‘kitchen’, and probably an occupational name for a cook or kitchen hand.

variants.name: Corey
meanings: English: possibly from the Old Norse personal names Kori (of unexplained etymology) or Kári (from kárr ‘curl’ or ‘quarrelsome’). Alternatively, a habitational name from one or more of Curry Mallet or Curry Rivel (Somerset), West Curry or Cory in Morwenstow (Cornwall), or the river name in Coryton (Devon), all of which have early spellings with -o-.
Irish (Down; Tyrone): variant of   Curry  .
Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Cory   and   Korey  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry was born in 1055, in Enmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the son of Guillaume Malet and Hesilia Crispin. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Gilbert Malet. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry est né en 1055, à Enmore, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Guillaume Malet et Hesilia Crispin. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Gilbert Malet. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry wurde 1055 in Enmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Guillaume Malet und Hesilia Crispin geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Gilbert Malet mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry è nato il nel 1055 nel Enmore, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Guillaume Malet e Hesilia Crispin. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Gilbert Malet. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Enmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdo: イギリスイギリスソメルセトエンモー
ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curryは1055年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトエンモーでGuillaume MaletとHesilia Crispinの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Gilbert Maletとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry(은)는 1055년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 모어에서 Guillaume Malet(와)과 Hesilia Crispin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Gilbert Malet(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Enmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdo: Enmore, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry nasceu em 1055, em Enmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Guillaume Malet e Hesilia Crispin. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Gilbert Malet. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry родился в 1055 г. в местности энмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Guillaume Malet и Hesilia Crispin. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Gilbert Malet. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Gilbert Malet De Curry nació en 1055, en Enmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Guillaume Malet y Hesilia Crispin. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Gilbert Malet. Murió en su pueblo.
